# CSUN Assistive Technology Conference 2026 -- Comprehensive Report

*Auto-generated analysis of CSUN AT Conference data (2023-2026)*

## Executive Summary

The 2026 CSUN AT Conference features **359 sessions** presented by **512 unique presenters** from **296 organizations**. The conference has grown 13.6% in session count from 2023 to 2026.

**Key trend**: AI/ML-related sessions grew from 29 in 2023 to 48 in 2026 (65.5% growth), now representing 13.4% of all sessions.
